title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to the Tenant to Account with pending invite
scenario: Verify data correctness when switching from an account linked to a tenant to an account with a pending invite
steps: Log in with Account linked to Tenant A, go to Support > App, verify Tenant A info is present.
Logout, log in with a different Account not linked to any Tenant but with a pending invite, go to Support > App, verify Tenant name and ID are not present on the card.
expected: After moving from an Account linked to a Tenant to an Account with a pending invite, the data should be correct: Tenant A info is present for the linked account, and Tenant name and ID are not present on the card for the account with a pending invite.
